description: Implement a token bucket rate limiter. Create a class TokenBucket with __init__(self, capacity: int, refill_rate: float) where capacity is the max tokens and refill_rate is tokens added per second. Implement consume(self, tokens: int, current_time: float) -> bool that returns True if the request is allowed (and consumes the tokens), False otherwise. Tokens refill continuously based on elapsed time since last consume call — do not refill beyond capacity. Do not use any time or threading imports; current_time is always passed in.
